basic_details.job_title: BISAG-N Software Developer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Bhaskaracharya National Institute for Space Applications and Geo-informatics (BISAG-N) has officially announced the Software Developer Recruitment 2026 with 15 openings. The detailed notification was published on the official BISAG-N website. Candidates who hold a B.E./B.Tech (CSE/CE/IT) or MCA degree with a minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CPI/CGPA and possess at least 2 years of relevant experience can now submit their applications through email. The application process is open and interested candidates must apply on or before 08 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech (CSE/CE/IT) or MCA with minimum 60% marks or equivalent CPI/CGPA. Minimum 2 years of experience required.
qualification.details: Software Developer: B.E./B.Tech (CSE/CE/IT) or MCA Minimum 60% marks or equivalent CPI/CGPA from a recognized university Minimum 2 Years Experience Required

salary_details.details: Software Developer: Up to ₹70,000/- per month

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BISAG-N Software Developer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BISAG-N Software Developer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Software Developer position is 08-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Software Developer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B.Tech (CSE/CE/IT) or MCA degree with a minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CPI/CGPA.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for this role?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 2 years of relevant experience is required for the Software Developer position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Software Developer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of up to ₹70,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for Software Developers?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies for the Software Developer post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is to be done via Email.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for a Contract-based position.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location is in Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official email address to send the application?
faq.answer: Candidates should send their resume and mandatory documents to [email protected].

faq.question: Q10. Does BISAG-N offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation is not explicitly detailed in the provided data; please refer to the official notification for specifics.
